title: A Letter for Dalhurst
description: Tharin Ironbeard has asked you to deliver a sealed letter to his contact in Dalhurst, a man named Aldric Vane who runs a curiosities shop. The dwarf was cryptic about its contents, mentioning only that it concerns 'matters of great importance'. The wax seal bears an unfamiliar crest - perhaps the mark of some secret society.

objectives.description: Deliver the letter to Aldric Vane
